main.name: Georgiy
main.responsibilities: Developed responsive user interfaces: landing pages (advanced animation: GSAP, Lottie, CSS), web applications (admin panels), UI kits, and SEO. Integrated with the backend (REST API).
main.nextjs_landing_responsibility: Next.js — development of a landing page with a gallery, contact form, responsive layout, and SEO.
main.learning_projects_intro: During training, projects were built with the following functionality:
main.learning_project_1: 1. Backend API integration — adding/removing photos, responsive layout. Vanilla JS with class-based architecture. Technologies: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Webpack, BEM, pair programming via VSCode Live Share.
main.learning_project_2: 2. SPA, Drag & Drop, user authorization/registration, client-side routing with redirects, adding/removing orders, order history. Technologies: React, Redux, React DnD, WebSocket, TypeScript.
main.learning_project_3: 3. Unit testing and E2E testing with Cypress, practical study of algorithms and data structures. Technologies: React.js, TypeScript, Jest, Cypress, Yarn.
main.learning_project_4: 4. Full-stack project — backend on a virtual server (Yandex Cloud): Node.js (Nest), Nginx, PM2 setup. Dockerized services orchestrated with Docker Compose. HTTPS via Certbot. Frontend with React.js, Redux Toolkit, TypeScript.
main.chemical_industry_12_years: 12 years in the chemical industry — sulfuric acid / oleum production
main.career_progression: Operator > Shift Supervisor > Lead Process Engineer

faq.question1: What is the best way to contact you?
faq.answer1: The fastest way to reach me is via Telegram: {'@'}georrg55 or on LinkedIn: Georgiy Revazashvili. I usually reply within 1 business day. For formal inquiries or collaboration offers, you can also use email: georgyrevazashvili{'@'}yandex.ru.
faq.question2: What types of projects do you specialize in or prefer to work on?
faq.answer2: I enjoy building dynamic landing pages with thoughtful animations to improve user engagement and conversion. I develop interactive user interfaces with a user-first approach. Frontend SEO optimization includes semantic markup, dynamic meta tags, structured data, and page speed improvements.
faq.question3: What technologies and tools make up your core stack?
faq.answer3: My core stack includes Vue.js, the Nuxt meta-framework, and also React (Next.js).
